title: Functionalized silk fibroin film scaffold using β-Carotene for cornea endothelial cell regeneration.
skim_notes: high priority. Silk fibroin film scaffold functionalized with beta-carotene; clear fabrication, endothelial cell biology, transparency, contact angle, FTIR and FESEM data.

title: Constructing a Novel Three-Dimensional Biomimetic Corneal Endothelium Graft by Culturing Corneal Endothelium Cells on Compressed Collagen Gels.
skim_notes: high priority. Compressed collagen gel/sheet scaffold; clear fabrication, endothelial cell testing, SEM/ZO-1, and Young's modulus measurement.

title: Investigating the effect of chitosan/ polycaprolactone blends in differentiation of corneal endothelial cells and extracellular matrix compositions.
skim_notes: medium_high priority. Chitosan/polycaprolactone blend membrane; fabrication and endothelial biological testing are strong, but optical/mechanical outcomes are limited mainly to FTIR and AFM characterization.

title: Evaluation of reconstructed human corneal endothelium sheets made with porcine Descemet's membrane in vitro and in vivo.
skim_notes: high priority. Porcine Descemet's membrane scaffold/carrier; decellularization and EGDE treatment described; endothelial cell-sheet testing and in vivo cat transplantation.

title: Customizable Collagen Vitrigel Membranes and Preliminary Results in Corneal Engineering.
skim_notes: high priority. Collagen type I vitrigel membranes; strong fabrication details, endothelial cell testing, transparency/thickness/SEM/FTIR/handling data, and preliminary rabbit transplantation.

title: Bioprinting of human pluripotent stem cell derived corneal endothelial cells with hydrazone crosslinked hyaluronic acid bioink.
skim_notes: high priority. Hydrazone-crosslinked hyaluronic acid bioink; strong fabrication, hPSC-derived corneal endothelial cell biology, rheology, printability and shape-fidelity data.
